title: polypodium brasiliense var. neriifolium
intro: Polypodium brasiliense var. neriifolium, also known as Brazilian polypody or Neri's polypody, is a type of fern native to South America, specifically Brazil and other surrounding countries. This medicinal plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium brasiliense var. neriifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Polypodium brasiliense var. neriifolium are typically made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
